## What
Brief description of changes.

## Why
What problem does this solve or what feature does this add?

## How
Implementation approach — any design decisions worth noting.

## Checklist
- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] New behavior includes tests
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, command help text)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-convention)
